headline: TE Connectivity Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) reported fiscal second-quarter 2026 results that management said reflected broad-based growth, record orders, and continued margin expansion, while also raising its outlook for AI-related revenue in the second half of the year. Quarterly performance and updated outlook CE
